output.setting: Ash-choked obsidian caverns of Mount Cinder

pickup.effect: Inflicts chill status that slows enemy attack speed

pickup.effect: Negates all fiery environmental damage for 10 seconds

encounters.trigger: The collapse of the Lava Golem clears the sulfur mist, exposing the path to the inner Core Chamber.

pickup.name: Heart of the Mountain
pickup.effect: Doubles geomancy damage against igneous entities

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Magma Weaver shatters the containment runes, unlocking the final descent to the boss.

boss.name: Ignis Prime, The World-Breaker
boss.victory_condition: Channel the Heart of the Mountain into the forge to stabilize the volcanic pressure.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Solar Sprite activates the bulkhead lift leading to the Engineering Bay

pickup.name: Magnetic Wrench
pickup.effect: Disables mechanical shielding on robotic foes

encounters.trigger: The fallen sentinel drops an override key required to enter the Reactor Core

pickup.name: Reactor Stabilizer Core
pickup.effect: Used to suppress the boss during the final engagement

encounters.trigger: The destruction of the Void Drone unlocks the final chamber door to the boss arena

boss.name: Celestial Architect
boss.victory_condition: Insert the stabilizer core into the architect's core slot while it is vulnerable

normalized.objective: Stabilize the station's dying reactor before the star goes supernova
